title: Ridicule
body:
# !!IMPORTANT!! : DATAPACK IS STILL IN BETA. MAY OR MAY NOT HAVE ISSUES

# Ridicule
Ridicule is a Mod/Datapack that adds the most random items to minecraft. These items range from Grenades to literal Wine Bottles. All of these items are showcased on the 'Simiae' channel. These items were all made with pure stupidity

The mod supports all Mod Loader Platforms. Currently, I have added the **Land Mine.** More stupid items will be added and updated to be better in the future

## 🔥Features
So far we only have One added item. This item is the land mine. The functionality of this item is simple. You can place it down anywhere. But remember; Don't step anywhere near it. If you do, well you will go boom and you will see a very unfriendly screen


## ️️⚙️Datapack Version
The datapack version may look strange with all your items being not what they are meant to look like. The reason is because You have not installed the required resource pack. The mod version has the textures already packaged in it but the datapack version is separate 

[![Requires](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/Simiea/simiae-badges@master/assets/compact/requires/simiaerp_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simiaes-resources)

## Permissions

### You Can:
- Showcase the datapack and/or resource pack in any format if you credit the authors (**Simiae**)
- Share the datapack and/or resource pack with the [**Modrinth**](https://github.com/Simiea/hurling/issues) link
- Use the datapack and/or resource pack on your own server
- Modify the datapack and/or the resource pack for **private use** only!

### You Can't:
- Showcase or share the data pack and/or resource pack without **properly crediting the authors**.
- Reupload any contents of the datapack and/or resource pack to **anywhere**.
- Claim the datapack and/or the resource pack **as your own**.
- Modify the datapack or the resource pack for **public** use.

## 🐛Reporting Issues
Please use the [issue tracker](https://github.com/Simiea/ridicule/issues) linked on the side of the page to report bugs, crashes, and other issues.
